query:
UPDATE partners p
JOIN user_role_cities urc ON p.userId = urc.userId AND urc.role = 'cityPartner'
SET 
  p.accountName = '李一涵',
  p.bankName = '中国银行股份有限公司郑州嵩山南路支行',
  p.accountNumber = '6217858000108793883'
WHERE JSON_CONTAINS(urc.cities, '"郑州"');

UPDATE partners p
JOIN user_role_cities urc ON p.userId = urc.userId AND urc.role = 'cityPartner'
SET 
  p.accountName = '赵浩然',
  p.bankName = '上海浦东发展银行天津分行浦诚支行',
  p.accountNumber = '6217931552994917'
WHERE JSON_CONTAINS(urc.cities, '"南京"');
